The Claude Code page now exposes exactly the three requested source tabs, applies source filtering before search, preserves duplicate row visibility, and keeps marketplace rows read-only within the active tab.
No blocking scrutiny issues were found for the `claude-source-tab-followup` milestone.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document an approved worker commit workflow for dirty shared worktrees (for example, a temporary-index flow) so workers can still produce isolated commits without cleaning or stashing unrelated changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission guidance forbids cleaning/stashing unrelated dirty files, but the reviewed feature handoff still had to deviate from the normal procedure and improvise a temporary-index commit flow to create commit `073fedc6a19e8c099a803e86357e5d8ad17f724e`.
